# Plugin Advisor

> Plugin Advisor is a free web tool that recommends verified Claude Code plugin combinations based on project analysis. It helps developers set up Claude Code plugins without trial-and-error by providing scored recommendations, conflict detection, and one-click install scripts.

## What This Tool Does

- Analyzes project descriptions (text, file, or GitHub URL) to recommend matching Claude Code plugins
- Scores existing plugin combinations (0-100) with conflict warnings and coverage gaps
- Provides preset starter packs for common use cases (beginner, web app, data, backend)
- Detects plugin conflicts and suggests verified alternatives
- Generates copy-paste install scripts for recommended plugins

## Key Facts

- 51 verified plugins in database (39 MCP servers + 12 plugins)
- 10 coverage categories for combination analysis
- 4 preset starter packs for quick setup
- 6 starter guides for reducing setup failure
- Scoring model: 100-point deduction system (conflicts -20, redundancies -7, uncovered -7)
- Available in Korean and English

## Core Pages

- /advisor: Project analysis — input project description, get plugin recommendations
- /optimizer: Combination analysis — paste `claude mcp list` output, get scored diagnosis
- /plugins: Full plugin catalog with MCP/Plugin type filtering
- /plugins/{id}: Individual plugin details with install commands and prerequisites
- /guides: Starter guides for setup decisions
- /guides/{slug}: Individual guide pages

## Target Users

- Developers setting up Claude Code for the first time
- Claude Code users wanting to optimize their plugin stack
- Tech leads standardizing team plugin configurations

## Optional

- Site: https://pluginadvisor.cc
- Language: Korean (primary), English (supported)
- Tech: Next.js 14, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui
